svg.title: Tokenizer Fertility Tradeoff
svg.desc: Same phrase "vintage camera lens" tokenized two ways: a general vocabulary splits it into ~8 small subword tokens, while a custom e-commerce vocabulary produces only ~3 tokens — fewer tokens means shorter sequences, fewer decode steps, and roughly 34% faster inference (LiLiuM).

text.font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Same phrase — two vocabularies — very different token counts

svg.text: Token fertility = avg tokens per word. Lower fertility means the vocabulary better covers domain terms as single tokens.
